ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nations" (
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nation */,
  "nation_name" TEXT /* Name of the nation */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the nation is located */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the nation */,
  "alliance" TEXT /* Alliance or coalition the nation belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_classes" (
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft class */,
  "cls_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft class */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., fighter jet, bomber) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the aircraft (e.g., air superiority, ground attack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nation that fought the battle */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft class used in the battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date the battle was fought */,
  "battle_location" TEXT /* Location where the battle was fought */,
  "battle_name" TEXT /* Name of the battle */,
  "battle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_battle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_type_id") REFERENCES battle_types ("battle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES aircraft_classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_nation_id FOREIGN KEY ("nation_id") REFERENCES nations ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_types" (
  "battle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle type */,
  "battle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the battle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battle type */,
  "aircraft_involved" TEXT /* Aircraft involved in the battle type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location where the battle was fought */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nation that owns the aircraft */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft class */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_deployed" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was deployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_nation_id FOREIGN KEY ("nation_id") REFERENCES nations ("nation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES aircraft_classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft performance entry */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle where the aircraft performed */,
  "ab_br" REAL /* Air-to-air battle rating */,
  "ab_lower_br" REAL /* Lower air-to-air battle rating */,
  "ab_battles_sum" INTEGER /* Total air-to-air battles fought */,
  "ab_battles_mean" REAL /* Average air-to-air battles per engagement */,
  "ab_win_rate" REAL /* Air-to-air win rate */,
  "pilot_skill" REAL /* Skill level of the pilot */,
  "aircraft_condition" REAL /* Condition of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_performance_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_air_performance" (
  "air_perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft air performance entry */,
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft performance entry */,
  "ab_air_frags_per_battle" REAL /* Average air fragments per battle */,
  "ab_air_frags_per_death" REAL /* Average air fragments per death */,
  "air_speed" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft in the air */,
  "air_agility" REAL /* Agility of the aircraft in the air */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_air_performance_perf_id FOREIGN KEY ("perf_id") REFERENCES aircraft_performance ("perf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_ground_performance" (
  "ground_perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft ground performance entry */,
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft performance entry */,
  "ab_ground_frags_per_battle" REAL /* Average ground fragments per battle */,
  "ab_ground_frags_per_death" REAL /* Average ground fragments per death */,
  "ground_speed" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft on the ground */,
  "ground_agility" REAL /* Agility of the aircraft on the ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_ground_performance_perf_id FOREIGN KEY ("perf_id") REFERENCES aircraft_performance ("perf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., analyst, commander) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle outcome */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the battle (if any) */,
  "casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties */,
  "damage_assessment" REAL /* Assessment of damage (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_damage" (
  "damage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage event */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., structural, engine) */,
  "severity" REAL /* Severity of the damage (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "repair_time" REAL /* Time required to repair the damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_damage_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_damage_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the pilot */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the pilot */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nation the pilot belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pilots_nation_id FOREIGN KEY ("nation_id") REFERENCES nations ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilot_aircraft_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pilot_aircraft_assignments_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pilot_aircraft_assignments_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)
